ferries.name: Valletta ↔ Sliema
ferries.note: Pleasant way to cross between Valletta and Sliema. Great views of the Grand Harbour fortifications.

walking.intro: Valletta is very walkable — the entire old city is about 1km × 600m. You can walk end to end in 20 minutes.

routes.name: Valletta Heritage Walk
routes.description: City Gate → Republic Street → St John's Co-Cathedral → Upper Barrakka Gardens → Grand Harbour viewpoint. ~45 minutes, mostly flat.

walking.warning: Malta is very hot June–September. Carry water, wear a hat, and avoid walking midday (12–3pm). Most churches and museums are air-conditioned.
